We Would Love To Have You

If you have a genuine interest in working with seniors, enjoy a challenging and rewarding career and thrive in a multi-disciplinary team environment, we have the following positions are available to qualified candidates.

Please note, that all successful candidates are required to have a police criminal records check and medical TB test prior to beginning employment at Yaletown House. 

We thank you for your interest; however, only candidates selected for interviewing will be contacted. No phone calls please.

Job Opportunities

View current job opportunities at Indeed.com.

About Us

Yaletown House is a Long-Term Care Home serving the needs of 127 seniors and older adults with advanced and long-term health challenges. We are a not for profit organization staffed by dedicated multidisciplinary professionals and supported by the Yaletown House Foundation and team volunteers.
